message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
entity "app_translation ((Translations))" as app_translation {
    *label : string
    description : longText
    privacyPolicyExtensions : longText
    *createdAt : createdAt
    updatedAt : updatedAt
    *appId : foreignKey
    *languageId : foreignKey
}

entity "app_action_button_translation ((Translations))" as app_action_button_translation {
    *label : string
    *createdAt : createdAt
    updatedAt : updatedAt
    *appActionButtonId : foreignKey
    *languageId : foreignKey
}

entity "app_action_button (App action buttons)" as app_action_button {
    *id : id
    entity : string
    *view : string
    url : string
    *action : string
    openNewTab : bool
    label : translated
    appId : foreignKey
    *createdAt : createdAt
    updatedAt : updatedAt
    translated : json
}

entity "app_template (App templates)" as app_template {
    *id : id
    template : longText
    *path : string
    active : bool
    appId : foreignKey
    *createdAt : createdAt
    updatedAt : updatedAt
}

entity "app (Apps)" as app {
    *id : id
    *name : string
    *path : string
    author : string
    copyright : string
    license : string
    *active : bool
    *configurable : bool
    privacy : string
    version : string
    iconRaw : blob
    icon : string
    appSecret : string
    modules : list
    cookies : list
    label : translated
    description : translated
    privacyPolicyExtensions : translated
    integrationId : foreignKey
    aclRoleId : foreignKey
    *createdAt : createdAt
    updatedAt : updatedAt
    translated : json
}

entity "language" as language
entity "integration" as integration
entity "acl_role" as acl_role
entity "custom_field_set" as custom_field_set
entity "webhook" as webhook

app_translation --> language
app_action_button_translation --> language
app_action_button_translation --> app_action_button
app_action_button --> app
app_template --> app
app_translation --> app
app --> integration
app --> acl_role
app --> custom_field_set
app --> webhook
@enduml
```
